name: West Village
description: Welcome to WestVillage, an immersive RPG set in a rural English town where factions of vampires, witches, werewolves, and inquisitors vie for control under the moonlight of Ravenshore. Embark on this journey of intrigue, betrayal and magic, where your character will shape the destiny of the city. Choose your faction, forge alliances and face supernatural challenges as you uncover an ancient prophecy. The night is full of secrets, and each choice will shape the course of this battle between the shadows. Get ready for a unique and unpredictable experience in the “West Village”.
creator: Linkeer
